situation: audit-2026-07-07-047 derived fix dispatch. In orchestrator.ts runPipeline(), the parallel detection path (method==='parallel') has two .catch() handlers that silently swallow errors and return empty arrays, but neither sets detectFailed=true. When both VL detection and local segmentation fail in parallel mode, productRegions resolves to [] with detectFailed still false → no warning shown to user, debugInfo.error is undefined, pipeline continues silently with zero regions producing incorrect counts.
action: Added detectFailed=true alongside existing parallelErrors.push() in both .catch() handlers of the parallel branch. This ensures the downstream warning at line 262 fires and debugInfo.error is populated when parallel detection fails.
outcome_evidence: Commit b282103 on auto/opt-background-1783213292. Added 2 lines (detectFailed=true in each catch handler). Pushed to origin. Main working tree reverted clean.
next_suggestion: Dispatch SZ-BG-M-003 (compressFallback/preprocessForVL O(n²) base64 concat — same pattern as SZ-BG-H-002 which was merged)
Dispatch SZ-BG-M-005 (mergeMultiSourceResults lacks skipFuzzy perf guard)
After high-severity pending fixes exhausted, consider SZ-SH-H-001 (excess host_permissions) which needs architectural decision

audit_findings.finding: parallel detection path .catch() handlers never set detectFailed flag — silent failure with zero regions when both VL and local segmentation fail
audit_findings.remediation: Add detectFailed=true in each .catch() handler alongside existing parallelErrors.push()
